'''novadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labiate|labiate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labiate|labiate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| novadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:novadithi|novadithi]] || [[word:novadiji|novadiji]] || [[word:novadishi|novadishi]] || [[word:novadiki|novadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:novaduthuthu|novaduthuthu]] || [[word:novadujuju|novadujuju]] || [[word:novadushushu|novadushushu]] || [[word:novadukuku|novadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:novaduthu|novaduthu]] || [[word:novaduju|novaduju]] || [[word:novadushu|novadushu]] || [[word:novaduku|novaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:novadufthuf|novadufthuf]] || [[word:novadufjuf|novadufjuf]] || [[word:novadufshuf|novadufshuf]] || [[word:novadufkuf|novadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:novadethe|novadethe]] || [[word:novadeje|novadeje]] || [[word:novadeshe|novadeshe]] || [[word:novadeke|novadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:novadothotho|novadothotho]] || [[word:novadojojo|novadojojo]] || [[word:novadoshosho|novadoshosho]] || [[word:novadokoko|novadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:novadotho|novadotho]] || [[word:novadojo|novadojo]] || [[word:novadosho|novadosho]] || [[word:novadoko|novadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:novadofthof|novadofthof]] || [[word:novadofjof|novadofjof]] || [[word:novadofshof|novadofshof]] || [[word:novadofkof|novadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:novadÃŸfthÃŸf|novadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:novadÃŸfjÃŸf|novadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:novadÃŸfshÃŸf|novadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:novadÃŸfkÃŸf|novadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:novadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|novadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:novadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|novadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:novadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|novadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:novadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|novadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:novadÃŸfthÃŸf|novadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:novadÃŸfjÃŸf|novadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:novadÃŸfshÃŸf|novadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:novadÃŸfkÃŸf|novadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:novadÃŸfthÃŸf|novadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:novadÃŸfjÃŸf|novadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:novadÃŸfshÃŸf|novadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:novadÃŸfkÃŸf|novadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:novadÃḊthÃḊ|novadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:novadÃḊjÃḊ|novadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:novadÃḊshÃḊ|novadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:novadÃḊkÃḊ|novadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:novadathatha|novadathatha]] || [[word:novadajaja|novadajaja]] || [[word:novadashasha|novadashasha]] || [[word:novadakaka|novadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:novadatha|novadatha]] || [[word:novadaja|novadaja]] || [[word:novadasha|novadasha]] || [[word:novadaka|novadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:novadafthaf|novadafthaf]] || [[word:novadafjaf|novadafjaf]] || [[word:novadafshaf|novadafshaf]] || [[word:novadafkaf|novadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:novadasha|novadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:novadshÃḋsha|novadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:novadrosha|novadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:novadmusha|novadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:novadyasha|novadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonovadnkshÃḋsha|gonovadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonovadnkrosha|gonovadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonovadnkmusha|gonovadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonovadnkyasha|gonovadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:novavadasha|novavadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:novavadshÃḋsha|novavadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:novavadrosha|novavadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:novavadmusha|novavadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:novavadyasha|novavadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonovavadnkshÃḋsha|gonovavadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonovavadnkrosha|gonovavadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonovavadnkmusha|gonovavadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonovavadnkyasha|gonovavadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nevÃḊdasha|nevÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nevÃḊdshÃḋsha|nevÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nevÃḊdrosha|nevÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nevÃḊdmusha|nevÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nevÃḊdyasha|nevÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonevÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|gonevÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonevÃḊdnkrosha|gonevÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonevÃḊdnkmusha|gonevÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonevÃḊdnkyasha|gonevÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:novfadasha|novfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:novfadshÃḋsha|novfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:novfadrosha|novfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:novfadmusha|novfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:novfadyasha|novfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonovfadnkshÃḋsha|gonovfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonovfadnkrosha|gonovfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonovfadnkmusha|gonovfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonovfadnkyasha|gonovfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
